desc: Accra mixes Atlantic beaches, major West African art institutions, and one of the region's best food scenes, with trip comfort shaped mostly by humidity and rain timing.
hls: Jamestown and Independence Arch heritage corridor
Strong contemporary art circuit around Osu and Labadi
Day trips to Ada estuary and Kakum-side rainforest routes

todo.name: Jamestown lighthouse and old quarter walk
todo.desc: Walk Jamestown's fishing harbor lanes, murals, and colonial-era landmarks with a local guide.

todo.name: Makola + Osu food run
todo.desc: Split a day between Makola market and Osu for kelewele, grilled tilapia, and modern Ghanaian kitchens.

todo.name: Labadi beach sunset
todo.desc: Time beach hours for late afternoon breezes and live-music evenings.

todo.name: W.E.B. Du Bois Center + National Museum
todo.desc: Pair both sites for context on pan-African history and modern Ghana statehood.

todo.name: Aburi Botanical Gardens day trip
todo.desc: Use a half-day trip to the cooler Akuapem ridge for forest shade and viewpoints.

todo.name: Art Center crafts session
todo.desc: Browse the Arts Centre stalls for textiles, beads, and woodwork with room to bargain politely.

wifi.note: Business hotels and coworking spots are generally reliable; verify backup power during stormy weeks.

prac.fltNote: London has year-round nonstop service to Accra, while many other UK/Ireland departures connect via Amsterdam, Brussels, or Istanbul; fares spike around July-August and December holidays.
prac.currency: Ghana local currency (check live rates before booking).
prac.lang: Local language plus tourism-level English in main visitor areas.
prac.tz: Check local timezone and DST rules for exact travel dates.
prac.visa: Confirm current entry/transit rules for your passport before booking.
alerts: Flash flooding can affect low-lying roads in peak rains (April-June and September-October), so avoid tight same-day airport transfers.
Carry small cash for market transport and beach vendors; card acceptance drops outside malls and larger hotels.
Heavy traffic on Spintex and Liberation roads can double evening transfer times, especially before public holidays.

sweet: Nov-Feb for drier weather and easier city logistics; shoulder Mar and Sep can work with flexible rain plans.
